zh.lifeSummary: 當John Talbot於1319年9月29日出生在英國賀福爾理查茲 卡素時，他的父親Richard Talbot35歲，母親Joan Mortimer11316歲。他與Julian de Grey結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1355年9月20日在他的家鄉享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Talbot于1319年9月29日出生在英国賀福爾理查茲 卡素时，他的父亲Richard Talbot35岁，母亲Joan Mortimer11316岁。他与Julian de Grey结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1355年9月20日在他的家乡享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Talbot was born on 29 September 1319, in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England, his father, Richard Talbot, was 35 and his mother, Joan Mortimer, was 11316. He married Julian de Grey. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 20 September 1355, in his hometown, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Talbot est né le 29 septembre 1319, à Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Talbot, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Joan Mortimer, avait 11316 ans. Il a épousé Julian de Grey. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1355, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Talbot am 29. September 1319 in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Talbot 35 und seine Mutter Joan Mortimer 11316. Er hat Julian de Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. September 1355 im Alter von 35 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Talbot è nato il il 29 settembre 1319 nel Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Talbot, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Joan Mortimer, aveva 11316 anni. Lui sposato Julian de Grey. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 settembre 1355, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Talbotが1319年9月29日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャーズ カストルで生まれた時，父Richard Talbotは35歳，母Joan Mortimerは11316歳であった。Julian de Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1355年9月20日に故郷で35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Talbot(이)가 1319년 9월 29일 영국 허퍼드실르 리처스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Talbot(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Mortimer(은)는 11316세였다. 그는 Julian de Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1355년 9월 20일 그의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.29 September 1319–20 September 1355: 29 de setembro de 1319–20 de setembro de 1355
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Talbot nasceu em 29 de setembro de 1319, em Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Talbot, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Joan Mortimer, tinha 11316 anos. Ele casou-se com Julian de Grey. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1355, em sua cidade natal, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Talbot родился 29 сентября 1319 г. в местности ричардс кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Talbot было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Mortimer, 11316. Он женился на женщине по имени Julian de Grey. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 сентября 1355 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 35 лет.

es.29 September 1319–20 September 1355: 29 de septiembre de 1319–20 de septiembre de 1355
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Talbot nació el 29 de septiembre de 1319, en Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Talbot, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Joan Mortimer, tenía 11316 años. Se casó con Julian de Grey. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1355, en su pueblo, a la edad de 35 años.
